sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94016" key="sidhrobo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῐδηρο-βόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σιδηροβρώς, ς. σίδηρος</foreign> <sense id="n94016.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a file</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:174" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.174</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
